name: Better Than Sex Cake#3
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the German chocolate cake according to the directions on the German chocolate package or from a mix.
2. Bake in a 9x13-inch pan.
3. Cool the cake for 5-10 minutes, then cool it another 20 minutes.
4. Using the end of a wooden spoon, poke holes in the cake every half to one inch.
5. Drizzle sweetened condensed milk and butterscotch topping into the holes (some will land on top of the cake).
6. Sprinkle crushed Heath bars over the top.
7. Serve with whipped cream or topping.
